name: Afterdinner Mints
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ tablespoons Butter or shortening, softened
recipeInstructions:
Combine egg white, cream, vanilla, peppermint oil, and desired food coloring in a large bowl. Stir until well combined.
Gradually add the powdered sugar to the mixture, stirring continuously until smooth and firm.
If necessary, incorporate the butter into the mixture, adding more powdered sugar as needed for texture.
Shape the mixture into small balls using a spoon or piping bag with a star tip.
Place the mint balls on waxed paper and press each one lightly with the tines of a fork dipped in powdered sugar or cornstarch to create an even coating.
Allow the mints to set overnight at room temperature. Once firm, pack them in clean tins with layers of waxed paper between each layer for storage.
